phases.name: Environment & Dependency Stabilization
phases.summary: Unified Python environment with hardened requirements.txt and validated cloud connectivity.

phases.name: Database & Isolation Layer
phases.summary: Implemented MongoDB transaction isolation and Qdrant thread-filtering for zero-leakage vector memory.

phases.name: Determinism Layer
phases.summary: Full implementation of TEST_MODE with centralized UUID/Time mocks for 100% reproducible E2E tests.

phases.name: API & State Integrity
phases.summary: Enabled Pydantic strict mode (extra='forbid') and global CreatorResponse envelope standardization.

phases.name: Frontend Testability
phases.summary: Systematic data-testid injection and automated response unwrapping in the API service layer.

phases.name: Playwright Suite Deployment
phases.summary: Initialized deterministic E2E suite covering Auth, Onboarding, and AI Pipeline flows.

phases.name: Dead Code Archiving
phases.summary: Repository hygiene restoration and archiving of all legacy diagnostic and clutter files.
